title: cyclosorus × altissimus
intro: Cyclosorus × altissimus is a hybrid plant species that results from the crossing of Cyclosorus angustus and Cyclosorus interruptus, both members of the fern family (Polypodiaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus × altissimus include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be used in herbal preparations, such as salves and poultices, to treat various health conditions.
